Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Sharise Jackson
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Marcina Mayweather is present.
Attorney Elle Lewis representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Mark Divelbiss, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
